_comment: Domain-based configuration for the export chain validator. Each domain is an independent validation scope with its own root, checks, and registry decorators.
_note_tooling: Currently, adding a new component TYPE (e.g. a new @scorer decorator) requires manually adding a domain entry here. We do NOT yet auto-update this config via /implement-tool or similar commands. This is a known gap — if a new decorator is introduced and this config is not updated, the validator will silently miss it. The zero-decorated-functions warning mitigates this partially. Automating config updates when new component types are added is a future improvement to flag on PRs that introduce new decorators.

exceptions._comment: Symbols in sub-package __all__ that are not registered via decorators.
